character.description: cute stardust cosmetic shop icons for a cozy slime clicker game: auras, sky themes, speech bubble skins, click particle sets

aura-pink.action: soft pink glowing ring orb icon, halo of pink light around a small jelly bead

aura-mint.action: soft mint green glowing ring orb icon, halo of mint light around a small jelly bead

aura-gold.action: soft golden glowing ring orb icon, halo of warm gold light around a small jelly bead

bg-dawn.action: tiny framed painting icon of a dawn sky, warm orange and purple gradient bands with one cloud

bg-abyss.action: tiny framed painting icon of a deep calm sea, dark blue bands with two small bubbles

bg-aurora.action: tiny framed painting icon of an aurora night sky, green and purple light ribbons with stars

bubble-pink.action: pink speech bubble icon with a small ribbon bow on the corner

bubble-gold.action: warm gold speech bubble icon with a small star on the corner

pt-heart.action: burst of three small pink hearts icon, click particle set

pt-star.action: burst of three small gold sparkle stars icon, click particle set

pt-note.action: two bouncy music notes icon with a tiny motion arc, click particle set

style: pixel-art-adjacent low-resolution game sprite, compact chibi/mascot-friendly proportions when the base allows it, chunky whole-body silhouette, thick dark 1-2 px outline, visible stepped/pixel edges, limited palette, flat cel shading with at most one small highlight and one shadow step, simple readable face, clear limbs, and no detail that disappears at small runtime size. Avoid polished illustration, painterly rendering, anime key art, 3D render, vector app-icon polish, glossy lighting, soft gradients, anti-aliased high-detail edges, and complex tiny accessories.
